PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" --user=grafioschtrader --password=adergraf --database=grafioschtrader --skip-column-names --batch --execute="DESCRIBE assetclass; DESCRIBE stockexchange; DESCRIBE multilinguestring; DESCRIBE multilinguestrings;")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" --user=grafioschtrader_t --password=grafioschtrader_t --database=grafioschtrader_t --batch --execute="SELECT a.id_asset_class, a.category_type, a.spec_invest_instrument, a.sub_category_nls, en.text AS en, de.text AS de FROM assetclass a LEFT JOIN multilinguestrings en ON a.sub_category_nls = en.id_string AND en.language='en' LEFT JOIN multilinguestrings de ON a.sub_category_nls = de.id_string AND de.language='de' WHERE a.category_type=1 AND a.spec_invest_instrument=10;")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" --user=grafioschtrader_t --password=grafioschtrader_t --database=grafioschtrader_t --batch --execute="SELECT m.currency, s.name AS security_name, sc.url_history_extend AS fred_series, sc.id_connector_history, se.name AS stockexchange, en.text AS assetclass_en FROM risk_free_rate_mapping m JOIN security s ON s.id_securitycurrency=m.id_securitycurrency JOIN securitycurrency sc ON sc.id_securitycurrency=m.id_securitycurrency JOIN stockexchange se ON se.id_stockexchange=s.id_stockexchange JOIN assetclass a ON a.id_asset_class=s.id_asset_class JOIN multilinguestrings en ON en.id_string=a.sub_category_nls AND en.language='en' ORDER BY m.currency;")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" --user=grafioschtrader_t --password=grafioschtrader_t --database=grafioschtrader_t --batch --execute="UPDATE stockexchange SET no_market_value = 0 WHERE name = 'Risk-Free Rate Sources'; SELECT id_stockexchange, name, no_market_value, secondary_market FROM stockexchange WHERE name = 'Risk-Free Rate Sources';")

PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" --user=grafioschtrader --password=adergraf --database=grafioschtrader --batch --execute="SELECT s.id_securitycurrency, s.currency, sc.url_history_extend, COUNT\(h.id_history_quote\) AS hq_count, MIN\(h.date\) AS hq_min, MAX\(h.date\) AS hq_max FROM security s JOIN securitycurrency sc ON s.id_securitycurrency=sc.id_securitycurrency LEFT JOIN historyquote h ON h.id_securitycurrency=s.id_securitycurrency WHERE sc.id_connector_history='gt.datafeed.fred' GROUP BY s.id_securitycurrency ORDER BY s.currency; SELECT '---tasks for 4291---' AS hdr; SELECT id_task_data_change, progress_state, failed_message_code, failed_stack_trace, exec_start_time, exec_end_time FROM task_data_change WHERE id_entity=4291 AND entity='Security' ORDER BY id_task_data_change;")
